repo_prior_art.cite: doc/API.md ExactID/PartialID empty; nearest eid_dml_orth_uniform_v1 is DML/LRO/ADML projection diagnostics, not formula-IV shift-share

published_prior_art.cite: BorusyakHullJaravel2025ECTJ and BorusyakHull2023Econometrica already give formula-IV/recentering orthogonality and expected-instrument adjustments; common Pi A epsilon notation is bookkeeping

repo_prior_art.cite: nearest eid_lp_svar_nonequiv_v1 is LP/SVAR row-space non-equivalence, not recentered/design-based formula-IV leakage

published_prior_art.cite: BorusyakHull2023Econometrica: recentered instruments subtract counterfactual average treatment/instrument; no verified iff null-space frontier versus design conditioning

repo_prior_art.cite: nearest q1_spectral_phase_transition_p1_markov is panel row-space support threshold, not shift-share formula-IV witness

published_prior_art.cite: AdaoKolesarMorales2019QJE and GoldsmithPinkhamSorkinSwift2020AER cover inference/weights, not an open finite-support recentering-vs-design witness

novelty_flags.label: proposal
novelty_flags.one_line: For a flagship-targeted shift-share diagnostic, the survey misses BorusyakHullJaravel2025JEP, A Practical Guide to Shift-Share Instruments, which explicitly frames two identification paths and practical checklists.

soundness_flags.label: Setup / Assumption 4
soundness_flags.one_line: The leakage definition E[r|W,G]-E[r|W]=Omega^{1/2} epsilon omits dependence on G; as written a conditional-mean function of G is equated to a fixed vector.

soundness_flags.label: Theorem 1
soundness_flags.one_line: From beta(A)=beta_exp+<L_A(epsilon),q_A>/Gamma(A), consistency is the scalar hyperplane <L_A(epsilon),q_A>=0, not L_A(epsilon)=0 unless an extra uniform-over-scores or one-dimensional-image assumption is added.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The claimed exact consistency regions ker(Pi^{1/2}A) do not reduce from the stated moment expansion; the expansion gives q_A-orthogonality regions, so the flagship null-space frontier is not coherent as stated.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Redefine epsilon as a covariance or linear-projection coefficient involving the centered shock vector, so the leakage object is a fixed vector derived from an actual moment rather than a conditional-mean function with missing G-dependence.

Replace exact consistency regions by scalar moment-zero sets for fixed q_A, or explicitly change the estimand to uniform validity over all admissible first-stage scores and state the needed rank/dimension assumptions.

Add Borusyak, Hull, and Jaravel 2025 Journal of Economic Perspectives as a published comparison and explain whether the proposed residual-norm diagnostic refines or merely repackages its practical checklists.

recommended_next_step: Pivot or repair the core statement before Stage 0: the current null-space frontier does not follow from the stated IV moment algebra.
